Capital Markets Dinner 2026

Royal Park Partners and Bowmark Capital look forward to welcoming you for an evening of seasonal food, conversation and industry insights, offering an opportunity to connect with peers and step away from the day-to-day.

Date
Tuesday 16 June 2026
Timing
Please arrive from 6.30pm for a drinks reception followed by 7pm sit down for dinner.
Venue
Dalloway Terrace, London
Format
Networking dinner and drinks

03 · Hosts

About us

Bowmark is a leading private equity investment firm specialising in technology, data and services companies. Established in 1997, Bowmark manages funds of over £2 billion. Its focus is on four core areas of the technology sector: data and insight, managed IT services, software, and technology-enabled business services.

The firm invests up to £300 million per transaction through majority or significant minority stakes in companies with compelling growth prospects, that are seeking a supportive, value-added partner to help them realise their ambitions. With our strategic support and capital, we work in partnership with management teams to accelerate growth and build exceptional businesses.

View our track record
Monty Ismail
Investment Director
Monty joined Bowmark in 2024 as an investment director and leads the financial services practice. He is a member of the software and tech-enabled services teams, and is involved with Bowmark’s investments in WSD and CubeLogic. Prior to Bowmark, Monty was at Levine Leichtman Capital Partners and led investments in Cleversoft and Creditinfo. Monty previously worked in equity derivatives and investment banking at Barclays Capital.
Tom Elliott
Partner
Tom is a partner and a member of the firm’s software team. Since joining Bowmark in 2014, he has been involved in a number of investments including Turnkey, Xperience and Cornwall Insight. Prior to Bowmark, Tom spent eight years at PwC, where he was a member of the corporate finance team.

Founded in 2019, Royal Park Partners is an independent investment bank providing specialist corporate finance advice to the FinTech sector. Our team has deep domain expertise in financial services and technology.

We provide bespoke advice to FinTech companies who are looking to raise capital or explore M&A opportunities, from mid-stage fundraises through to later-stage capital raises and exits.

View our track record
Aman Behzad
Founder and Managing Partner
Seasoned corporate finance professional with 20+ years of M&A experience built across Citi, Arma Partners and FT Partners. Recognising the need for specialist Fintech advisors, he founded Royal Park Partners in late 2019.
Abhi Toor
Co-Founder and Managing Director
Abhi heads up our emerging markets and EMEA coverage, having advised corporates and sponsors alike on multiple buy-side, sell-side and financing transactions. Before joining Royal Park Partners, he built his career with more than a decade at Barclays Investment Bank.
